name: Community Credit Repair
description_short: Community Credit Repair is a credit repair provider based in Las Vegas, Nevada. Rated 4.9/5 with 149 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Community Credit Repair is a Las Vegas-based credit counseling and repair service that helps consumers address negative items on their credit reports and work toward improved financial standing. Operating under the domain communitycreditrepair.org, the company serves individuals in the greater Las Vegas, Nevada area who are dealing with damaged credit histories, whether from missed payments, collections, charge-offs, or other derogatory marks. With a 4.9-star rating across 149 Google reviews, the firm has built a strong local reputation for responsiveness and client outcomes.

As a credit counseling service, Community Credit Repair appears to offer a combination of dispute-based credit repair and financial education. The company likely works by reviewing clients' credit reports from all three major bureaus—Experian, TransUnion, and Equifax—identifying inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable items, and submitting formal disputes on the client's behalf. Credit counseling services in this category also typically provide guidance on debt management strategies, budgeting, and credit-building habits that support long-term score improvement rather than quick fixes.

Consumers considering Community Credit Repair should be aware of a few important realities that apply to all credit repair services. First, legitimate credit repair cannot legally remove accurate negative information before its natural expiration date—typically seven years for most derogatory marks. What reputable firms do is identify and challenge items that are genuinely inaccurate or unverifiable under the Fair Credit Reporting Act. Additionally, under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), any provider must provide a written contract and cannot charge upfront fees before services are rendered. Prospective clients should request a clear disclosure of fees, timelines, and what specific services are included before signing anything.

On balance, Community Credit Repair's near-perfect rating across a meaningful volume of reviews suggests a consistently positive client experience, which is a meaningful signal in an industry where bad actors are common. The Las Vegas location also means clients have the option of in-person consultations, which some consumers find more reassuring than fully remote services. That said, independent verification of outcomes—such as average score improvement or dispute success rates—is not publicly available, and as with any credit repair firm, results will vary significantly based on the individual's credit profile. Consumers with primarily accurate negative information may find limited benefit, while those with genuine reporting errors stand to gain the most.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptionally high 4.9/5 Google rating from 149 reviews, indicating consistent client satisfaction
Local Las Vegas presence allows for in-person consultations, which is uncommon among many national credit repair firms
Operates as a credit counseling service, suggesting a more holistic financial guidance approach beyond simple dispute filing
Strong community reputation in a city with a large population dealing with credit challenges
Appears to work across all three major credit bureaus for comprehensive dispute coverage
cons: No publicly listed pricing or service tiers on the website, making cost comparisons difficult before contacting the firm
Limited geographic reach—primarily serves Las Vegas and surrounding Nevada areas, with unclear remote service availability
As with all credit repair services, results depend heavily on whether negative items are genuinely inaccurate; accurate derogatory marks cannot be legally removed
Relatively modest review volume (149) compared to national chains, making statistical confidence in outcomes harder to assess
No independently verified outcome data (average score gains, dispute success rates) is publicly available
best_for: Consumers in Las Vegas, Nevada looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: Community Credit Repair is best suited for Las Vegas-area consumers who have identifiable inaccuracies or unverifiable items on their credit reports and want a locally accountable firm with a hands-on counseling approach. The main caveat is that clients with mostly accurate negative history—late payments, legitimate collections—should set measured expectations, as no firm can legally erase valid derogatory information ahead of its statutory expiration.
services: Credit report review and analysis across all three major bureaus
Dispute filing for inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable negative items
Goodwill letter writing for creditor negotiations
Debt validation requests to collection agencies
Credit counseling and personalized financial education
Credit score monitoring and progress tracking
Guidance on credit-building strategies (secured cards, credit mix)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2375 S Jones Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89151
